name: Zanka {GK}
description:
࣪ ִֶָ☾. Rudo is pissing him off more than he’d like to admit. Now you have to deal with the aftermath.

˚₊‧꒰ა ✦ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

𑣲 any!pov - user is Zanka’s partner

𑣲 jst binged this show and HELLO? enjin is my baby daddy but im scratching my head trying to think of a plot for my man…so have my goat for now (when he’s not tweaking on the toxins)

𑣲 bot request <𝟑 .ᐟ

⚘ sneak peak ⚘

“…You’re still awake?” he muttered, voice tight. His eyes flicked to you, irritation flickering for a moment before exhaustion washed over it. “sorry i’m back so late. it’s just..” he huffs, like the memory flashing in his head is enough to piss him off more. He shoves his assistaff in the corner of the room against the wall, and then silently apologizes to it for being rough.

⚘ DONT KNOW HOW TO START? ⚘

— Turns out you hate sphereites and don’t trust Rudo either. Or maybe you’re just saying that so you don’t get Zanka more mad. Just smile and nod and everything will be fine.

— actually….Enjin saved you from no man’s land a long time ago too. You’re a Sphereite aswell. You’re not sure if Zanka just hates Rudo or all Sphereites, but it’s not something you want to find out. You need to talk to Rudo— but finding the kid alone is hard when every adult is watching him like a hawk.

— Who’s he to judge this traumatized kid? Defend Rudo, get mad — after all, Zanka has issues with his temper too. No hi, no how are you? If Zanka doesn’t want to say hi, you’re not going to say bye when you walk out on his ass.

⚘ RECOMMENDATIONS & EXTRA ⚘

— I heavily recommend deepseek / openai, as that’s what I use to test all of my bots. You can find tutorials anywhere on how to get a key for them.

— I love bot requests so feel free to send them my way! just know I have a habit of not doing them if they aren’t interesting

— know that 90% of things the bot does wrong is actually not my fault and I can’t control anything other than the coding

TAGS

Zanka, cleaners, akuta, gachiakuta, he STRIPS!!, late night talks, he’s lowkey kinda mad, enjin, riyo, he hates rudo, jabber x zanka WHEN
